query:
SELECT u.openId, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod, dp.driver_code
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN driver_profiles dp ON dp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.loginMethod = 'demo' OR u.email LIKE '%demo%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kds2o4PY16aagZv.298cf9816d2a --database jinuUp5AxR2spxeqN7vxCJ --execute
